nodes.label: Project C — Phase 3: Utilities Hub & Electricity Bill Calculator
nodes.norm_label: project c — phase 3: utilities hub & electricity bill calculator

nodes.label: SharedModule.kt
nodes.rationale: Configures Koin dependency injection for common repositories (Auth, Profile, Calculator, Expense) and use cases, mapping interfaces to implementations and providing factories.

nodes.label: requirements.md
nodes.rationale: Establishes baseline toolchain versions including Java 17, Kotlin 2.3.20, Gradle 8.14.3, Android API 36, and major KMP and Firebase library targets.

nodes.label: PRODUCT.md
nodes.rationale: Defines target demographic of independent university students, outlining a premium design persona to avoid generic templates and emphasize visibility and control.

nodes.label: DESIGN.md
nodes.rationale: Sets styling guides based on 'The Lucid Lens' concept, specifying color palettes (Lucid Indigo #6200EE), typography constraints, translucent glass components, and spatial spacing rules.

nodes.label: Audit.md
nodes.rationale: Outlines user experience and interface visual flaws such as inconsistent glassmorphism execution, inappropriate usage of dividers instead of spatial whitespace, flat data visualization, and slow manual context-switching.

nodes.label: Lucid Glass Aesthetic
nodes.rationale: Elevate the app's visual quality to meet the 'Lucid Glass' premium aesthetic, replacing flat clipped Boxes with transparent, blurred surfaces to unify the glassmorphism.

nodes.label: Contextual Dashboard
nodes.rationale: Sort widgets dynamically based on user context; e.g. prioritizing ExpenseSummaryWidget and ElectricityGraphWidget when day of month >= 25, and tailoring greetings based on time of day.

nodes.label: Inline Quick Add
nodes.rationale: Introduce an inline quick-add state triggered by long-pressing an action card, removing interaction latency by expanding the card inline rather than navigating away.
